programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. However, the contestants are given a minor reprieve when Don assigns them to some stretch PT to give them a break before the ropes course gauntlet in the afternoon.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 6 kicks off with some much anticipated weapons training and tactical shooting. Armed with some killer Black Aces shotguns, the teams are challenged with a unique course of fire. From there, Athlon Optics and Modern Pneumatic Sporting Devices configure a hunting air rifle for the contestants to play with.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Kyle and Caleb give the skinny on the hamstring pull that was heard around the world. From there, Surviving Mann fans get a glimpse at just how far Faraday containers can go to protect your security, privacy and device. After, Black Aces does a deep dive into their available products and some exciting plans for the future.

programme.title: Hawaii, A Journey Through The Big Island

programme.title: Autumn Exhilaration
programme.desc: The exhilaration of autumn in the Colorado Rockies and High Sierras awaits you in our latest film release! The inspiring scenery is accompanied by a soothing ambient music soundtrack. Runtime 2.5 Hours.

programme.title: Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Journey to the rugged heart of the Montana Rockies. This cinematic exploration captures the monumental scale of Glacier’s ancient, ice-carved valleys and its iconic, turquoise alpine lakes. Watch the first light of dawn hit the jagged peaks of the Garden Wall and follow the mist as it drifts over the cedar forests of Lake McDonald. A breathtaking tribute to one of America’s most pristine and powerful wilderness sanctuaries.
